name: sort by splits year
description: Test case for sort by splits year
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('RB')), "player_years_weeks" as (SELECT player_years.pid, nfl_year_week_timestamp.year, nfl_year_week_timestamp.week FROM player_years INNER JOIN nfl_year_week_timestamp ON player_years.year = nfl_year_week_timestamp.year WHERE nfl_year_week_timestamp.year = 2024), "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" as (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams, "nfl_games"."week", "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs"."active" = true group by "nfl_games"."week", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."pid"), "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."year", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 <= 20 AND bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1.30 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 <= 20 AND trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 2.25 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 > 20 AND bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 0.48 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 > 20 AND trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1.43 ELSE 0 END), 2) as weighted_opportunity_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos" AS "pos_0", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams as player_nfl_teams_0, "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c"."weighted_opportunity_from_plays" AS "weighted_opportunity_from_plays_0", "player_years_weeks"."week", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_years_weeks" on "player_years_weeks"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_years_weeks"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" on "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."year" = "player_years"."year" and "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."week" = "player_years_weeks"."week" left join "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c" on "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c"."year" = 2024 and t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c.week = player_years_weeks.week where player.pos IN ('RB') and 'TB'::text = ANY(t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams::text[]) group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams, "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c"."weighted_opportunity_from_plays", "player_years_weeks"."week", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by player_years_weeks.week DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
